creator: exploringlondon
caption:
There’s a new way to see the Sistine Chapel without leaving London 👀 Hidden in America Square near Tower Hill Station, this is Michaelangelo’s Sistine Chapel: The Exhibition (ad-pr)

Explore these life-sized masterpieces up close with 34 breathtaking, high-definition images to see, and there’s a free audio guide, just download the app and bring your own headphones! It’s like walking on the ceiling of the Sistine Chapel itself, discover every intricate detail, stories and more!

🎟️ Book on @fever_uk and use code EXPLORINGLONDON10 for 10% off!
Tickets from £18 but currently reduced for opening week 😍
📍1 America Square
👥 All ages welcome

#feverambassador #michaelangelo #sistinechapel

transcription.text: Right by Tower Hill Station, you'll find this building, which looks like a regular block of offices. But inside is a way to see the Sistine Chapel without leaving London. This is Michelangelo's Sistine Chapel, the exhibition. You can admire Michelangelo's masterpieces up close like never before. You'll find high-definition printed reproductions here of Michelangelo's greatest works, as if you're walking across the ceiling of the Sistine Chapel in real life. You can also enjoy a free audio guide filled with stories and curiosities about Michelangelo's masterpieces. You just have to download their app and bring your own headphones. So whether you've seen the Sistine Chapel in real life or you're discovering it for the first time, check it out and use our discount code for 10% off.
